flashcards.back:
- Temporary (defined start/end)
- Unique (creates something new)
- Progressive elaboration
- Resource constrained

Why - purpose
What - scope
When - schedule
Who - responsibilities
Where - organization
How - approach
How Much - resources

Fixed Price: Seller high risk
Time & Materials: Buyer high risk
Cost Plus: Buyer high risk
Cost Plus Fixed Fee: Shared risk

P - Planning (define goals)
O - Organizing (arrange resources)
M - Motivating (direct and inspire)
C - Controlling (monitor and correct)
